zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Baddesley於1495年出生在英國瓦維其可爾。她於1522年與Roger Cockayne在英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 恩索結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年在英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 恩索享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Baddesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baddeley Green in Staffordshire, Baddiley in Cheshire, or, less plausibly Badley in Suffolk, all named with the Old English personal name Bad(d)a + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Bodily
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): perhaps a variant of   Baddeley  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Baddesley was born in 1495, in Warwickshire, England. She married Roger Cockayne in 1522, in Baddesley Ensor, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1558, in Baddesley Ensor, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 63.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Baddesleyは1495年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた。1522年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー エンソルでRoger Cockayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー エンソルで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Baddesley(은)는 1495년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 워윅실르 바데슬리 소르에서 Roger Cockayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 영국 워윅실르 바데슬리 소르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Baddesley родилась в 1495 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Cockayne в 1522 г. в местности баддесли энсор, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1558 г. в местности баддесли энсор, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
